title: Onboarding - Continue as guest
scenario: Continue as guest during onboarding and navigate through permission prompts to reach the home screen on both Android and iOS
steps: 1. Launch the app and reach the onboarding screen
3. Handle the notification permission popup: tap "Allow" or "Don't Allow"
4. (iOS only) Handle the location permission popup: respond accordingly
5. (iOS only) Enter iPhone passcode when prompted
6. Observe the Poly Product Improvement Program popup appearing
7. User is directed to the home screen
expected: User completes the guest onboarding flow and is directed to the home screen.
